# PollPulse — Repository Blueprint

**Stack:** Bun + Elysia.js + Drizzle ORM + PostgreSQL  
**Deployment:** Render.com (Web Service + managed PostgreSQL + Cron Job)  
**Generated by:** Repo Builder Agent v4.3

---

## 1. Repository Structure

```
pollpulse/
├── src/
│   ├── index.ts                    ← Elysia app entry + plugin composition
│   ├── routes/
│   │   ├── auth.ts                 ← POST /api/auth/* (register, login, logout, refresh, me)
│   │   ├── polls.ts                ← /api/polls/* CRUD + stream
│   │   ├── public.ts               ← /api/public/* (vote page + submit vote)
│   │   ├── admin.ts                ← /api/admin/* (user + poll moderation)
│   │   └── health.ts               ← GET /health/live, GET /health/ready
│   ├── middleware/
│   │   ├── auth.ts                 ← JWT verify + user attach via .derive()
│   │   ├── rate-limit.ts           ← Upstash sliding window (auth + vote + global)
│   │   └── request-id.ts           ← X-Request-Id injection via .derive()
│   ├── lib/
│   │   ├── password.ts             ← argon2id hash + verify (@node-rs/argon2)
│   │   ├── jwt.ts                  ← sign / verify helpers
│   │   ├── slug.ts                 ← Unique slug generator (nanoid-based)
│   │   ├── ip-hash.ts              ← SHA-256(ip) for vote deduplication (no raw IP stored)
│   │   ├── sse.ts                  ← SSE client registry + broadcast helpers
│   │   └── logger.ts               ← Structured JSON logger
│   ├── db/
│   │   ├── index.ts                ← Drizzle client singleton
│   │   └── schema.ts               ← Drizzle schema (users, polls, poll_options, votes, refresh_tokens)
│   └── types.ts                    ← Shared type definitions + env validation
├── cron/
│   └── expire-polls.ts             ← Daily poll expiry + draft cleanup job
├── drizzle/
│   ├── 0000_initial.sql            ← users, polls, poll_options, votes, refresh_tokens
│   └── 0001_indexes.sql            ← Secondary indexes
├── test/
│   ├── setup.ts                    ← Test DB setup (test Postgres instance)
│   ├── routes/
│   │   ├── auth.test.ts
│   │   ├── polls.test.ts
│   │   ├── public.test.ts
│   │   └── admin.test.ts
│   └── lib/
│       └── ip-hash.test.ts
├── infra/
│   └── Dockerfile                  ← Multi-stage Bun production image
├── .github/
│   └── workflows/
│       └── ci.yml                  ← Lint → type-check → test → audit → deploy
├── render.yaml                     ← Render IaC (web service + postgres + cron)
├── drizzle.config.ts               ← Drizzle Kit config
├── .env.example
├── .gitleaks.toml
├── SECURITY.md
├── package.json
└── tsconfig.json
```

---

## 2. render.yaml

```yaml
services:
  - type: web
    name: pollpulse-api
    runtime: docker
    dockerfilePath: ./infra/Dockerfile
    plan: starter
    region: frankfurt
    healthCheckPath: /health/ready
    envVars:
      - key: NODE_ENV
        value: production
      - key: DATABASE_URL
        fromDatabase:
          name: pollpulse-db
          property: connectionString
      - key: JWT_SECRET
        generateValue: true
      - key: JWT_REFRESH_SECRET
        generateValue: true
      - key: UPSTASH_REDIS_REST_URL
        sync: false
      - key: UPSTASH_REDIS_REST_TOKEN
        sync: false
      - key: CORS_ALLOWED_ORIGINS
        sync: false
    autoDeploy: true
    numInstances: 1

  - type: cron
    name: pollpulse-expire-polls
    runtime: docker
    dockerfilePath: ./infra/Dockerfile
    schedule: "0 2 * * *"
    dockerCommand: bun run cron/expire-polls.ts
    envVars:
      - key: DATABASE_URL
        fromDatabase:
          name: pollpulse-db
          property: connectionString

databases:
  - name: pollpulse-db
    plan: starter
    region: frankfurt
    postgresMajorVersion: 16
```

---

## 3. Dockerfile

```dockerfile
# infra/Dockerfile
FROM oven/bun:1.1-alpine AS base
WORKDIR /app

FROM base AS deps
COPY package.json bun.lockb ./
RUN bun install --frozen-lockfile --production

FROM base AS builder
COPY package.json bun.lockb ./
RUN bun install --frozen-lockfile
COPY . .
RUN bun run type-check

FROM base AS runner
ENV NODE_ENV=production
WORKDIR /app

# Run as non-root user (Rule 21)
RUN addgroup --system --gid 1001 bunjs && \
    adduser --system --uid 1001 bunjs
USER bunjs

COPY --from=deps /app/node_modules ./node_modules
COPY --from=builder /app/src ./src
COPY --from=builder /app/cron ./cron
COPY --from=builder /app/drizzle ./drizzle

EXPOSE 3000

CMD ["bun", "run", "src/index.ts"]
```

---

## 4. Drizzle Schema

```typescript
// src/db/schema.ts
import { pgTable, uuid, text, boolean, integer, timestamp, pgEnum, unique } from 'drizzle-orm/pg-core'

export const roleEnum = pgEnum('role', ['user', 'admin'])
export const pollStatusEnum = pgEnum('poll_status', ['draft', 'active', 'closed', 'expired'])

export const users = pgTable('users', {
  id:           uuid('id').defaultRandom().primaryKey(),
  email:        text('email').notNull().unique(),
  displayName:  text('display_name').notNull(),
  passwordHash: text('password_hash').notNull(),
  role:         roleEnum('role').default('user').notNull(),
  isActive:     boolean('is_active').default(true).notNull(),
  createdAt:    timestamp('created_at').defaultNow().notNull(),
  updatedAt:    timestamp('updated_at').defaultNow().notNull(),
})

export const polls = pgTable('polls', {
  id:                   uuid('id').defaultRandom().primaryKey(),
  userId:               uuid('user_id').references(() => users.id, { onDelete: 'cascade' }),
  title:                text('title').notNull(),
  description:          text('description'),
  slug:                 text('slug').unique().notNull(),
  isPublic:             boolean('is_public').default(true).notNull(),
  allowMultiple:        boolean('allow_multiple').default(false).notNull(),
  showResultsAfterVote: boolean('show_results_after_vote').default(true).notNull(),
  status:               pollStatusEnum('status').default('active').notNull(),
  totalVotes:           integer('total_votes').default(0).notNull(),
  expiresAt:            timestamp('expires_at'),
  createdAt:            timestamp('created_at').defaultNow().notNull(),
  updatedAt:            timestamp('updated_at').defaultNow().notNull(),
})

export const pollOptions = pgTable('poll_options', {
  id:        uuid('id').defaultRandom().primaryKey(),
  pollId:    uuid('poll_id').notNull().references(() => polls.id, { onDelete: 'cascade' }),
  label:     text('label').notNull(),
  voteCount: integer('vote_count').default(0).notNull(),
  position:  integer('position').notNull(),
  createdAt: timestamp('created_at').defaultNow().notNull(),
})

export const votes = pgTable('votes', {
  id:        uuid('id').defaultRandom().primaryKey(),
  pollId:    uuid('poll_id').notNull().references(() => polls.id, { onDelete: 'cascade' }),
  optionId:  uuid('option_id').notNull().references(() => pollOptions.id, { onDelete: 'cascade' }),
  userId:    uuid('user_id').references(() => users.id, { onDelete: 'set null' }),
  ipHash:    text('ip_hash').notNull(),
  createdAt: timestamp('created_at').defaultNow().notNull(),
}, (t) => ({
  userUnique: unique().on(t.pollId, t.userId),
  ipUnique:   unique().on(t.pollId, t.ipHash),
}))
```

---

## 5. Testing Setup (Bun Test)

```typescript
// test/setup.ts
import { db } from '../src/db'

export async function resetDb() {
  await db.execute(sql`TRUNCATE votes, poll_options, polls, users RESTART IDENTITY CASCADE`)
}
```

```typescript
// test/routes/auth.test.ts
import { describe, it, expect, beforeEach } from 'bun:test'
import app from '../../src/index'
import { resetDb } from '../setup'

describe('POST /api/auth/register', () => {
  beforeEach(resetDb)

  it('creates user and returns tokens', async () => {
    const res = await app.handle(new Request('http://localhost/api/auth/register', {
      method: 'POST',
      headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
      body: JSON.stringify({
        displayName: 'Test User',
        email: 'test@example.com',
        password: 'Password123!',
      }),
    }))
    expect(res.status).toBe(201)
    const body = await res.json()
    expect(body.user.email).toBe('test@example.com')
    // httpOnly cookies set — no token in body
    expect(res.headers.get('set-cookie')).toContain('HttpOnly')
  })

  it('rejects duplicate email with 409', async () => {
    // first registration
    await app.handle(new Request('http://localhost/api/auth/register', {
      method: 'POST',
      headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
      body: JSON.stringify({ displayName: 'User', email: 'dup@example.com', password: 'Password123!' }),
    }))
    // duplicate
    const res = await app.handle(new Request('http://localhost/api/auth/register', {
      method: 'POST',
      headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
      body: JSON.stringify({ displayName: 'User2', email: 'dup@example.com', password: 'Password123!' }),
    }))
    expect(res.status).toBe(409)
  })
})

describe('Auth boundary', () => {
  it('returns 401 for protected route without token', async () => {
    const res = await app.handle(new Request('http://localhost/api/polls/my'))
    expect(res.status).toBe(401)
  })

  it('returns 403 for admin route with user role', async () => {
    const userToken = await getAuthToken('user@example.com', 'user')
    const res = await app.handle(new Request('http://localhost/api/admin/users', {
      headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${userToken}` },
    }))
    expect(res.status).toBe(403)
  })

  it('returns 200 for admin route with admin role', async () => {
    const adminToken = await getAuthToken('admin@example.com', 'admin')
    const res = await app.handle(new Request('http://localhost/api/admin/users', {
      headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${adminToken}` },
    }))
    expect(res.status).toBe(200)
  })
})
```

---

## 6. CI/CD (GitHub Actions + Render Deploy Hook)

```yaml
# .github/workflows/ci.yml
name: CI

on:
  push:
    branches: [main]
  pull_request:
    branches: [main]

jobs:
  test:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    services:
      postgres:
        image: postgres:16-alpine
        env:
          POSTGRES_DB: pollpulse_test
          POSTGRES_USER: postgres
          POSTGRES_PASSWORD: postgres
        ports:
          - 5432:5432
        options: >-
          --health-cmd pg_isready
          --health-interval 10s
          --health-timeout 5s
          --health-retries 5

    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - uses: oven-sh/setup-bun@v1
        with:
          bun-version: latest

      - run: bun install --frozen-lockfile

      - name: Security audit
        run: bun audit --level high
        continue-on-error: false

      - run: bun run lint
      - run: bun run type-check

      - name: Run migrations (test DB)
        run: bun run drizzle-kit migrate
        env:
          DATABASE_URL: postgresql://postgres:postgres@localhost:5432/pollpulse_test

      - name: Run tests
        run: bun test
        env:
          DATABASE_URL: postgresql://postgres:postgres@localhost:5432/pollpulse_test
          JWT_SECRET: test-secret-min-32-characters-long!
          JWT_REFRESH_SECRET: test-refresh-secret-min-32-chars!
          UPSTASH_REDIS_REST_URL: http://localhost:6379
          UPSTASH_REDIS_REST_TOKEN: mock-token
          CORS_ALLOWED_ORIGINS: http://localhost:5173

  deploy:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: test
    if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' && github.event_name == 'push'
    steps:
      - name: Trigger Render deploy
        run: |
          curl -f -X POST "${{ secrets.RENDER_DEPLOY_HOOK_URL }}"
```

**Required GitHub secrets:**
- `RENDER_DEPLOY_HOOK_URL` — Render deploy hook URL for the API service

**Render auto-deploys** on push to main when `autoDeploy: true` in render.yaml. The GitHub Actions deploy step serves as an explicit post-test trigger.

---

## 7. Security Files

```toml
# .gitleaks.toml
[extend]
useDefault = true

[[rules]]
description = "Render Deploy Hook URL"
regex = '''https://api\.render\.com/deploy/[a-zA-Z0-9_\-]+\?key=[a-zA-Z0-9_\-]+'''
tags = ["render", "deploy-hook"]

[[rules]]
description = "Upstash Token"
regex = '''AX[A-Za-z0-9_\-]{40,}'''
tags = ["upstash", "redis"]
```

```
# .env.example
NODE_ENV=development
DATABASE_URL=postgresql://postgres:postgres@localhost:5432/pollpulse_dev
JWT_SECRET=dev-secret-min-32-characters-here!!
JWT_REFRESH_SECRET=dev-refresh-secret-32-chars-here!
UPSTASH_REDIS_REST_URL=https://xxx.upstash.io
UPSTASH_REDIS_REST_TOKEN=dev-token
CORS_ALLOWED_ORIGINS=http://localhost:5173
PORT=3000
```
